title: Conditional HTTP Fetching, Redirects, Compression, and Publisher Budgets · Runtime Contract: Feed Go Redirect Scope
summary: Every poll downloads a full feed, validators are overwritten on failure, redirects bypass scope, compressed bytes expand without limit, and retries synchronize across publishers. Predict the reader decision, feed or API contract, Go and PostgreSQL ownership, bounded failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the feed go redirect scope increment in publisher-friendly conditional fetch client. Learners progress through prediction, explic…
objectives: Reapply scheme, authority, address, hop, credential, and loop policy at each redirect and record permanent moves separately.
Classify 200, 304, redirect, temporary, permanent, auth, missing, rate-limit, and unexpected responses before XML admission.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
